reasons: Diggie directly reduces Silvanna's teamfight lock value.
Time Journey can protect nearby allies during Silvanna's engage timing.

proof.summary: Silvanna wants Imperial Justice to restrain a target and force a trapped fight, while Diggie can grant nearby allies shield and control immunity.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for Silvanna's real engage.
Diggie stays close enough to protect the target Silvanna wants.
failureCases: Silvanna catches Diggie before he can cast ultimate.

reasons: Valir can push Silvanna away before or after her commit and reduce her ability to stay on top of targets.
His self-cleanse and movement boost also help him survive engage attempts.

proof.summary: Silvanna wants to dive and keep enemies inside her combat zone, while Valir can cleanse himself, gain movement speed, and use knockback to reset spacing.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves Searing Torrent for Silvanna's dive.
Valir avoids standing in Silvanna's direct ultimate path.
failureCases: Silvanna catches Valir while his tools are down.
Valir pushes too early and Silvanna re-engages after.

reasons: Kadita can reduce Silvanna's engage value with control immunity and damage reduction from Ocean Ode.
Rough Waves gives Kadita an untargetable burst window and can remove existing debuffs or crowd controls after she dives underground.
Kadita can punish Silvanna if Silvanna commits too deeply into Kadita's burst zone.

proof.summary: Silvanna wants to restrain a target with Imperial Justice and continue damage inside the Circle of Light, while Kadita can use control immunity, untargetable timing, and burst to survive or punish the commit.
worksBestWhen: Kadita times Ocean Ode before Silvanna's engage connects.
Kadita successfully enters Rough Waves before Silvanna finishes the damage sequence.
Silvanna dives without enough backup or after Kadita has prepared her combo.
failureCases: Kadita is caught before Ocean Ode or Rough Waves is available.
Silvanna baits Kadita's immunity first, then re-engages.
Kadita mistimes ultimate and still gets punished after the untargetable window ends.

reasons: Lunox can survive Silvanna's all-in timing with Brilliance invincibility.
Lunox can punish Silvanna's durability with Chaos Assault and Darkening windows after avoiding the initial engage.
This is a timing-based counter, not a guaranteed escape from every Silvanna ultimate.

proof.summary: Silvanna wants to trap one target and deal sustained magic damage inside her ultimate zone, while Lunox can use Brilliance to become invincible and survive the key damage window.
worksBestWhen: Lunox uses Brilliance before or during Silvanna's main damage window.
Lunox keeps enough spacing to avoid being forced into a bad Darkening blink.
Silvanna has already committed and cannot easily switch targets.
failureCases: Lunox is restrained before she can cast Brilliance.
Brilliance is used too early and Silvanna waits it out.
Lunox survives but cannot actually leave the danger zone afterward.

reasons: Kaja can drag Silvanna away from her preferred target after she dives.
Suppression gives the team a reliable way to punish Silvanna's all-in timing.

proof.summary: Silvanna wants to isolate one target, while Kaja can suppress and drag her into a punish position.
worksBestWhen: Kaja positions near the ally Silvanna wants to jump.
The team bursts Silvanna immediately after Divine Judgment.
failureCases: Kaja is the target and cannot respond cleanly.
Silvanna waits for Kaja to reveal or spend ultimate.
